case_title: ROSALYN M FAY VS. D7TV, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAY, ROSALYN M AS TO DEFENDANT D7TV, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAY, ROSALYN M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D7TV, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION $34,457.35 PRINCIPAL, $801.37 INTEREST, $365.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $35,623.72, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
